name_en: Dior 1:1 counter authentic top-grade imported original exotic skin Lady Dior 3-grid
name_cn:
Dior 1:1 counter authentic top-grade imported original exotic skin Lady Dior 3-grid
Lady Dior 3-grid rare snake skin debut, elegant yet distinctive, it's the one 👏🏼. Here's a fun fact: every snake skin pattern is unique 🔍, so the pattern of each bag will vary.
Size: 17cm
